summary: Phase 4 Industrial Integration - All 45 tests passed (19 new Phase 4 + 26 existing). Verified advanced synthesis planning, retrosynthesis engine, scale optimizer, industrial cost model, cost positivity, tokens_used=0 for advanced mode, and backward compatibility.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Advanced Mode toggle, scale selector, batch input all working

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Industrial Integration complete. All features verified: (1) Advanced Planning with use_advanced=true returns tokens_used=0, (2) Retrosynthesis endpoint /api/retrosynthesis/plan works, (3) Scale optimization /api/scale/optimize works for lab/pilot/industrial, (4) Industrial cost /api/cost/industrial returns positive costs with recovery savings, (5) Frontend Advanced Mode toggle shows scale selector and batch size input, (6) Results display scale info 'Scale: pilot, Batch: 10.0kg', (7) Backward compatibility maintained - basic mode still works.

phase4_features_verified.retrosynthesis_endpoint: VERIFIED - /api/retrosynthesis/plan returns routes with starting_materials, steps, estimated_yield, estimated_cost
phase4_features_verified.scale_optimization_endpoint: VERIFIED - /api/scale/optimize returns optimization with predicted_yield_percent and recommendations
phase4_features_verified.industrial_cost_endpoint: VERIFIED - /api/cost/industrial returns detailed cost breakdown with recovery_savings
phase4_features_verified.tokens_used_zero_advanced: VERIFIED - Advanced mode returns tokens_used=0 (no LLM calls)
phase4_features_verified.cost_positivity: VERIFIED - All costs >= 0 across all endpoints
phase4_features_verified.backward_compatibility: VERIFIED - Basic mode (use_advanced=false) still works with LLM tokens
phase4_features_verified.frontend_advanced_toggle: VERIFIED - Toggle enables/disables advanced mode UI
phase4_features_verified.frontend_batch_input: VERIFIED - Number input for batch size in kg
